textAnnotations.description:
THE
EXTRA
FLUE BEETLE
KOWOOPING DOWN
UPON THE UNDER-
WORLD TO SMASH
GANGLAND'S
DENIZENS, COMES
THIS DARING TWO-
FISTED CHARACTER,
THE BLUE BEETLE...
SOUGHT BY THE
POLICE, AND FEARED
BY ALL CRIMINALS,
THIS HARD-FIGHTING
CRUSADER FOR LAW
AND JUSTICE IS IN
REALITY DAN
GARRET, A ROOKIE
POLICEMAN.......
3
)
223)
